name: Vignette
summary: Darkens or tints the edges of a rendered scene.
description: Builds an aspect-correct radial mask around the screen center. Radius, softness, intensity, and tint are adjustable for subtle focus or dramatic tunnel vision.

uniforms.name: aspect
uniforms.description: Source width divided by source height.

uniforms.name: radius
uniforms.description: Distance from center where the vignette begins.

uniforms.name: intensity
uniforms.description: Blend strength of the vignette color.

uniforms.name: vignetteColor
uniforms.description: RGBA color applied at the edges.
